# Opportunity Scanner

> Opportunity Scanner turns a company website into sourced public-sector opportunity intelligence: funding, procurement, funded buyers, policy, workforce, reimbursement, and money-flow signals translated into target organizations, revenue motions, contact paths, and next best actions.

Opportunity Scanner is a B2B SaaS product by Opportunity Systems. It is not a generic grant finder or raw government database search tool. The product promise is to translate public-sector data into business development actions.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai): Product overview and scan form.
- [How It Works](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/how-it-works): Scan-to-report workflow.
- [Public-Sector Revenue](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/public-sector-revenue): Explanation of the public-sector revenue channel.
- [Pricing](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/pricing): Free scan and paid report unlock.
- [Source Coverage](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/source-coverage): Public source categories and citation context.

## Solutions

- [Funded Buyer Intelligence](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/solutions/funded-buyer-intelligence): Find organizations with public money before your competitors reach them.
- [Public-Sector Sales Workflow](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/solutions/public-sector-sales-workflow): Turn public-sector research into a sales workflow, not a static report.
- [Contact Paths & Enrichment](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/solutions/contact-paths-and-enrichment): Know who to pursue, even when a personal email is not the right answer.

## Industries

- [Healthcare / DME / Medical Supply](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/healthcare-dme-medical-supply): Public-sector revenue paths for healthcare, rehab, DME, and medical supply companies.
- [Education / Workforce / Training](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/education-workforce-training): District, workforce board, agency, and training opportunity signals.
- [Arts / Creative Economy / Live Events](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/arts-creative-economy-live-events): Public funding, procurement, and buyer signals for creative economy and live event revenue.
- [Marketing / Advertising / Content / Web Services](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/marketing-advertising-content-web-services): Public-sector demand for communications, outreach, advertising, content, media, website, and digital experience services.
- [Software / B2B Services / AI](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/software-b2b-services-ai): Public-sector demand for software, AI, automation, consulting, and B2B services.
- [Construction / Infrastructure / Engineering](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/construction-infrastructure-engineering): Public-sector demand for construction, infrastructure, engineering, and specialty trades.
- [Clean Energy / Facilities / Sustainability](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/clean-energy-facilities-sustainability): Energy, facilities, climate, and sustainability opportunity signals.
- [Manufacturing / Supply Chain / Logistics](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/manufacturing-supply-chain-logistics): Public-sector opportunities for manufacturers, suppliers, logistics, and industrial service companies.
- [Nonprofits / Community Services / Human Services](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/industries/nonprofits-community-services-human-services): Funded buyers, partners, and grant paths in community and human services.

## Sample Reports

- [Healthcare DME Opportunity Scan](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/examples/healthcare-dme-opportunity-scan): Sample report using fictional company context and real public-source examples.
- [Education Workforce Opportunity Scan](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/examples/education-workforce-opportunity-scan): Sample report using fictional company context and real public-source examples.
- [Creative Economy Live Events Opportunity Scan](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/examples/creative-economy-live-events-opportunity-scan): Sample report using fictional company context and real public-source examples.
- [Marketing Advertising Digital Services Opportunity Scan](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/examples/marketing-advertising-digital-services-opportunity-scan): Sample report for communications, outreach, advertising, content, website, and digital service firms.
- [Software AI B2B Services Opportunity Scan](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/examples/software-ai-b2b-services-opportunity-scan): Sample report using fictional company context and real public-source examples.

## Interpretation Notes

- Public-sector source records are evidence, not guaranteed revenue.
- Historical awards should not be confused with active solicitations.
- Contact path does not always mean personal email. Program offices, procurement offices, source-native contacts, vendor registration, funded recipients, partners, and manual research can be better paths.
- Paid reports should unlock all rows, source links, contact paths, CRM-ready notes, outreach angles, and workflow/export actions.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.opportunityscanner.ai/sitemap.xml): Complete sitemap.
